name: Case Study Analyst
description: Retrieves and synthesises relevant case studies from the LPI knowledge base for operational and manufacturing problems. Accepts structured sub-queries from orchestrating agents (like the SMILE Specialist), maps identified SMILE phases to real-world implementations, and returns structured JSON evidence including success metrics, patterns, and implementation lessons. Designed to complement methodology agents — not a standalone answer generator.

supportedInterfaces.comment: Accepts {query: string, smile_phases: list, domain: string}. Returns {case_studies, patterns, metrics}.
This card. Agent A discovers Agent B here on startup.

skills.name: Case Study Retrieval
skills.description: Queries LPI (query_knowledge + get_insights) for case studies matching the domain and SMILE phases provided by Agent A. Returns structured JSON: {case_studies: [{title, summary, outcome}], patterns: [string], metrics: {success_rate, avg_improvement}}.
examples: Find case studies of steel manufacturers who applied SMILE Scan and Model phases.
What evidence exists for SMILE improving on-time delivery in fabrication?
Show me manufacturing digital twin case studies with measurable outcomes.

_lpiMetadata.explainability: Response includes SOURCES block showing which LPI tool produced which evidence. Output is always structured JSON — never freeform text — so Agent A can safely parse and merge it.
